description: You are a production supervisor at a manufacturing plant. Using the workbook at /home/ga/Documents/time_clock_data.xlsx, calculate the weekly payroll by processing the 'Employees' and 'Time_Records' sheets. Create a 'Daily_Detail' sheet containing columns for Employee_ID, Name, Date, Clock_In, Clock_Out, Hours_Worked, Regular_Hours, and OT_Hours. Use formulas to calculate Hours_Worked ((Clock_Out - Clock_In) * 24), Regular_Hours (capped at 8), and OT_Hours (hours exceeding 8). Create a 'Weekly_Summary' sheet with columns for Employee_ID, Name, Department, Hourly_Rate, Total_Hours, Regular_Hours, OT_Hours, Regular_Pay, OT_Pay, and Total_Pay. Calculate Regular_Pay using the hourly rate, OT_Pay at 1.5 times the hourly rate, and Total_Pay as the sum of both. Include subtotal rows for the Assembly, Quality, and Warehouse departments, plus a company-wide Grand Total. Format the header, subtotal, and Grand Total rows as bold, and format the pay columns as currency with two decimal places. Save the updated workbook.
